# Ratchet Rebaseline Approval 2026-05-04

Approved-by: Repository owner via chat request
Reason: Introduce the sparse per-file debt ratchet ledger contract, migrate the full remaining structural exception inventory into the ledger, and fully migrate the current sub-100% source coverage inventory into the ledger by allowing coverage entries that mirror current `coverage.xml` module rates instead of keeping that dimension only in the reporting surface.
